# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

variables:
  DEPLOYMENT_TAG: "v${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-none}"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - echo "Deployment Tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
  only:
    - merge_requests
  tags:
    - deployment-$DEPLOYMENT_TAG

after_script:
  - echo "Build completed. Merge Request Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE, Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
